spec_match.rationale: Exercises a real surface of the spec's headline behaviour — animation-trigger / animation-range — declaratively start/pause/reset animations based on scroll position…

interactive.rationale: 4 buttons / 2 inputs / 0 selects / 3 ranges driving live JS — well past the static-card bar.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Either the feature-index blurb or the concept lede is missing — can't verify alignment.

edge_cases.rationale: Page handles real failure modes — feature detection, permission rejection, fallback paths are all wired into the script.

references.rationale: No chromestatus.com/feature/<id> link on the concept page — CLAUDE.md rule #3 says every page must carry the self-heal reference, not rely on the parent feature index.

design_system.rationale: All colours come from the shared CSS variables and the layout follows the stage + controls editorial pattern.

openQuestions.title: Add the chromestatus.com/feature link to this page
openQuestions.detail: Per CLAUDE.md rule #3, every concept page must include the https://chromestatus.com/feature/5181996801982464 link directly — it is the self-heal anchor used by the slug-recovery script. Right now the page links only back to the parent feature index.

openQuestions.title: Align the concept lede with the feature-index blurb
openQuestions.detail: The blurb on the feature index sells one promise; the concept lede frames a different angle. Either reword the lede to echo the blurb's keywords (so visitors recognise they're in the right place) or update the parent blurb.

summary: staggered-entrance under scroll-triggered-animations: 4 pass / 1 partial / 1 fail. Strong interactive surface, design system clean, spec story complete.
